See the * [FAQ in the README](README.md#problems-with-invalid-numbers] on how to make * metadata changes. * * Do not modify this file directly! */ return [ 67768 => 'Satsol', 67769 => 'Satsol', 6777 => 'Solomon Telekom', 6778 => 'BMobile', 6779 => 'Smile', 67791 => 'Satsol', 67792 => 'Satsol', 67793 => 'Satsol', ];
